character_designs.identity: Yan Nanzhi's southern teacher, older Zhaoming remnant official-scholar, and Fuyizhe representative who pressures her to become the Sun-Moon banner

body_and_face.age_lock: Older adult, approximately 60 to 68; authoritative and physically restrained, not youthful and not frail.
body_and_face.build: Slim, upright, scholar-official body with carefully controlled shoulders and long instructional hands.
body_and_face.face: Refined severe older face, attentive eyes, sunken scholar cheeks, thin mouth, visible age lines without horror makeup.
body_and_face.hair: Silver-streaked black hair in a restrained topknot or tied-back scholar style; neat beard or moustache allowed.
body_and_face.posture: Ceremonial, vertical, and pressure-heavy; teaching gestures and scroll handling matter more than combat readiness.

constant_anchors: old-imperial robe fragments preserved as living clothing
royal blue or peacock-blue inner layer
short over-jacket adapted to humid southern climate
partial inherited Zhaoming sun-moon pressure marks only as worn detail

state_designs.episode_range: Yan Nanzhi memory and blood-writ instruction contexts
state_designs.silhouette: Older southern official-scholar in light vermilion outer robe, royal-blue inner layer, short breathable over-jacket, and red-line scroll bag.
state_designs.color_logic: Southern old empire vermilion and royal blue identify old-court continuity; vine green and damp brown adapt the costume to the humid southern region; worn gold remains controlled and aged.
state_designs.damage_level: Preserved and complete, with humidity softening, edge wear, tarnished gold, and old thread only.
required_details: must read as Yan Nanzhi's older teacher rather than a ruler
red-line scroll bag must be visible
robe must be light enough for humid southern conditions
Zhaoming language remains partial inherited detail, not a clean badge

state_designs.silhouette: More complete Ming-inspired formal robe structure with wide sleeves, moon-white underlayer, vermilion and blue hierarchy, and strict vertical posture.
materials: thin gold-woven cloud and star-route pattern
state_designs.color_logic: Formal old-imperial palette is stronger here, but aged by cracks, humidity, and restrained lighting; gold is worn rather than triumphant.
state_designs.damage_level: No ragged damage; history appears as tarnish, cracked lacquer, softened fabric edges, and preserved old debt.
required_details: wide sleeves and formal layers must be clear
partial sun-moon/star-route embroidery may appear as inherited pattern only
no clean public chest emblem and no redesigned Zhaoming badge

state_designs.episode_range: Covert order, memory, and southern relay scenes
state_designs.silhouette: Same old-court teacher compressed into practical covert travel: gathered sleeves, darker short overcoat, damp-proof scroll tube, red-line wooden cylinder, and lacquer case.
state_designs.color_logic: Damp dark-brown and vine green cover the formal palette; vermilion, blue, and worn gold appear as controlled flashes at robe edge, cord, and clasp.
state_designs.damage_level: Travel wear, humidity stains, and rubbed hardware only; costume remains orderly and expensive.
required_details: must not look like an assassin, spy fantasy outfit, or martial hero
red-line scroll tube and oil-paper wrap must be readable
old-court authority remains visible under the darker travel layer
no modern briefcase or modern diplomat cues

detail_panels.purpose: Prevent youthful scholar drift or emperor/immortal drift.
detail_panels.notes: Older adult face, refined and severe, with controlled eyes, age lines, silver-streaked hair, and restrained beard.

detail_panels.purpose: Show his power as doctrine and etiquette pressure.
detail_panels.notes: Long hands pressing a scroll, pointing to a sealed order, or holding a red cord knot; no combat pose.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock his visual anchor from the Character Bible.
detail_panels.notes: Southern red-line scroll bag, red cord knots, oil-paper scroll tube, and red-line wooden cylinder.

detail_panels.purpose: Separate him from northern, Qingming, or palace-only costume logic.
detail_panels.notes: Thin gauze, breathable wide sleeves, short over-jacket, softened edges, and damp-proof storage.

detail_panels.purpose: Show preserved Zhaoming authority without a new badge.
detail_panels.notes: Worn-gold trim, partial star-route/sun-moon embroidery, old-court pendant, cracked lacquer, no clean chest emblem.

detail_panels.purpose: Tie the character to southern old empire spaces.
detail_panels.notes: Old white stone, vermilion lacquer screen, dark archive table, humidity stains, vine-shadowed background.

detail_panels.purpose: Prepare for covert order and blood-writ instruction scenes.
detail_panels.notes: Oil-paper wrap, lacquer case, red-line wooden tube, subdued formal robe edge, tarnished clasp.
Tiny worn partial pressure marks and inherited embroidery derived from existing Zhaoming language, never a new or clean badge.
